Spring Data MongoDB - Core
  1. org.springframework.data.mongodb.core
  2. ReactiveSessionScoped

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.ReactiveSessionScoped

Packages that use ReactiveSessionScoped
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core
MongoDB core support.

  • Uses of ReactiveSessionScoped in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core

    Methods in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core that return ReactiveSessionScoped
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReactiveSessionScoped
    ReactiveMongoOperations.withSession(com.mongodb.ClientSessionOptions sessionOptions)
    Obtain a session bound instance of SessionScoped binding a new ClientSession with given sessionOptions to each and every command issued against MongoDB.
    default ReactiveSessionScoped
    ReactiveMongoOperations.withSession(Supplier<com.mongodb.reactivestreams.client.ClientSession> sessionProvider)
    Obtain a session bound instance of SessionScoped binding the ClientSession provided by the given Supplier to each and every command issued against MongoDB.
    ReactiveSessionScoped
    ReactiveMongoOperations.withSession(Publisher<com.mongodb.reactivestreams.client.ClientSession> sessionProvider)
    Obtain a session bound instance of ReactiveSessionScoped binding the ClientSession provided by the given Publisher to each and every command issued against MongoDB.
    ReactiveSessionScoped
    ReactiveMongoTemplate.withSession(com.mongodb.ClientSessionOptions sessionOptions)
     
    ReactiveSessionScoped
    ReactiveMongoTemplate.withSession(Publisher<com.mongodb.reactivestreams.client.ClientSession> sessionProvider)
